opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My stomach is covered in these weeping blisters that itch so intensely it feels like burning.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: An itchy weeping rash came up on my belly where my belt buckle sits and I'm worried what it is.

symptom_narrative.onset: 48h ago after a new metal belt buckle against the skin
symptom_narrative.character: itchy, burning, red plaque with tiny blisters, some weeping/crusting
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: the rash is a rectangle matching the buckle; doesn't cross into a band around the body; NO fever, whole-body hives or breathing trouble

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; new metal belt buckle is the likely trigger

objective_data_offered.value: sharply demarcated rectangular red plaque with tiny blisters, some weeping, around the navel matching the buckle, visible on video
rash matches the buckle shape, does not form a band around one side of the body
